articles.description: Namma Metro: BMRCL has received the 13th train for the Yellow Line in Bengaluru. The train will undergo testing before entering service, while two more trains are expected soon to improve peak-hour frequency.

articles.title: Xbox executives depart while Compulsion Games shuts down
articles.description: Two seemingly unrelated stories breaking at the same time paint a grim picture for the state of Xbox. Corporate leadership changes rarely come without internal shakeups, reorganizations, and layoffs, and Xbox appears to be going through that right now. Just a few months after longtime Xbox head Phil Spencer left the company and former AI executive Asha Sharma was put in charge, the gaming world ...

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 wide may use thicker ultra-thin glass than Fold8 Ultra
articles.description: According to a report from last week, Samsung will use ultra-thin glass (UTG) of different thicknesses on the upcoming Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) and Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra. Both foldables are expected to debut in July alongside the Galaxy Z Flip8. Ultra-thin glass forms the top protective layer of a foldable phone's flexible AMOLED display. It helps reduce the crease while protecting the screen from drops. According to the report, the Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) will feature a 60μm-thick UTG. Leaked Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) render The taller Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, on the other hand, is...

articles.title: Morgan Stanley becomes first major Wall Street bank to open trillion-dollar wealth management system to AI agents, says: ‘The way we see it...’
articles.description: Morgan Stanley is pioneering direct AI access to its trillion-dollar wealth management systems for corporate clients. This groundbreaking move allows autonomous AI agents to interact with stock administration platforms, bypassing traditional human interfaces. The bank anticipates this will significantly scale services like client onboarding and support, marking a major shift in how financial institutions engage with technology.

articles.title: Samsung expands its Galaxy Book 6 lineup with a Snapdragon X2 Elite-powered model
articles.description: The Galaxy Book 6 Edge comes with 1TB of storage and 16GB of RAM, and it costs $2,100.

articles.title: Winning with AI: Prompting a skill to thrill
articles.description: AI skills are changing how we work. Instead of generic claims, skills are now specific AI instructions. This allows users to train AI assistants for repeated tasks. Think of them as mini-playbooks for your company. Creating effective skills requires defining exact outcomes, audience, and checks, writes Parminder Singh.

articles.title: Hostinger Web Hosting Review: Cool AI Tools for Quickly Building Sites
articles.description: Hostinger offers several noteworthy plans, excellent customer service, and useful AI tools, but it lacks a few features you get with the very best web hosting services.

articles.description: Arunachal Pradesh Chief Minister Pema Khandu inaugurated a new Bamboo and Cane Technology Centre. with an aim to transform the state's bamboo resources into valuable products. It will create jobs for local youth and artisans. The centre will foster innovation and skill development.

articles.title: Noise Diva Araya review: A glamorous smartwatch, but is it a pro or a con?
articles.description: The Noise Diva Araya brings much-needed style to the smartwatch segment with its premium design, comfortable fit and dependable battery life. However, the emphasis on glamour sometimes feels excessive, while connectivity hiccups and a frustrating companion app stop the experience from being as polished as the hardware.

articles.title: Starlink, Eutelsat-OneWeb, SES India under 'signal spillage' scrutiny from MHA
articles.description: Starlink's rivals, Eutelsat-OneWeb and SES, which partnered with India's Bharti Airtel and Reliance Jio, respectively, have also come under a wider review by the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) officials, according to the person who did not wish to be named.

articles.title: ‘Can’t COMPROMISE on safety!’: UK PM Starmer announces full SOCIAL MEDIA BAN for under-16 children
articles.description: The United Kingdom is preparing to introduce some of the world's toughest online safety measures for children. Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced plans to ban social media access for children under the age of 16, saying there will be 'no compromise on safety.' The government is also considering overnight social media curfews and restrictions on infinite scrolling for users under 18.

articles.title: UK PM Starmer announces social media ban for under-16 users: Which platforms will be affected?
articles.description: The move comes amid mounting concerns over the impact of social media on children's health and safety.

articles.title: India, Italy to expand trilateral cooperation in Africa via AI Hub
articles.description: India and Italy will expand trilateral cooperation in Africa via an AI Hub for Sustainable Development and initiatives in precision agriculture, water, health, and education, said Italian Ambassador Antonio Bartoli, highlighting a growing partnership.

articles.title: SpaceX's Bullish Debut: Oppenheimer Sets $190 Target, Stock Soars
articles.description: Oppenheimer initiated coverage on SpaceX with a bullish outlook and a $190 price target. The company made a historic debut on Nasdaq, with its stock (SPCX) surging 19% to $161, achieving a valuation of over $2 trillion on its first day.

articles.description: WhatsApp is reportedly rolling out group voice and video calling support on WhatsApp Web for selected beta testers. The feature allows users to start group calls directly from a browser and supports up to 32 participants. Users can choose specific participants, create call links, enable waiting rooms, and share their screens during video calls. Group calls remain prot...

articles.description: The feature allows motorists to start and pay for roadside parking through the ERP 2 on-board unit (OBU) display.

articles.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has warned that a small number of AI providers could capture most economic value, potentially weakening industries and reducing businesses’ control over knowledge and expertise.

articles.title: Mark Carney warns against AI dependence after US blocks access to Anthropic’s latest models
articles.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has cautioned against relying on a small group of dominant AI systems after a US export ban restricted foreign access to Anthropic’s newest models. Drawing parallels with the 2008 financial crisis, he urged countries to diversify AI capabilities and build greater resilience.

articles.title: Honor X80 Pro Max to debut on June 22, confirmed to pack a 11,000mAh battery
articles.description: Honor has announced the launch date for the X80 Pro Max. Alongside the confirmation, the company has also unveiled the phone's design and color options. The Honor X80 Pro Max is set to launch in China on June 22, the company confirmed in an official Weibo post. Honor has also opened reservations for the smartphone through its official online store. Honor has confirmed that the X80 Pro Max will pack a massive 11,000mAh battery with support for 90W wired fast charging. The device will also support 27W wired reverse charging, allowing it to double as a power bank for charging other...

Will SpaceX's $75 billion IPO set the ball rolling for Reliance Jio and NSE listings in India?
articles.description: SpaceX's massive IPO is making waves globally. However, Indian market experts believe this will not directly impact upcoming listings of Jio Platforms and NSE. The timing for these Indian mega IPOs will depend on domestic market sentiment and conditions. Geopolitical easing could also play a role.

articles.title: MHT CET PCM Result 2026: Scorecards for engineering aspirants soon at cetcell.mahacet.org
articles.description: MHT CET PCM Result 2026: MHT CET 2026 PCM result is expected to be released soon by the State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra, on cetcell.mahacet.org. Lakhs of engineering aspirants can download their scorecards using application credentials. The exam saw over 7.25 lakh registrations with percentile-based normalization across shifts. PCB results were declared earlier on June 8. CAP counselling is likely to begin in late June after result publication and merit preparation for admissions across engineering colleges in Maharashtra state.

articles.title: ByteDance in talks with China's Iluvatar CoreX to purchase AI chips
articles.description: ByteDance, the influential technology entity known for its innovative platforms, is reportedly in discussions to acquire AI chip technology from Iluvatar CoreX and Baidu. This strategic move is largely focused on securing in-house chip supplies essential for running complex inference tasks. Should this partnership materialize, Iluvatar CoreX may join the ranks as ByteDance's third key GPU vendor.

articles.title: Piyush Goyal, UK's Peter Kyle discuss boosting tech, startup ties
articles.description: Union Minister Piyush Goyal and UK's Peter Kyle held talks to strengthen bilateral collaboration in innovation, technology, and startups. The meeting comes as both nations work to finalize a comprehensive trade agreement, with some issues still pending.

articles.title: Modi tells India’s deep-tech story to the world, Macron backs him up
articles.description: Before the cameras rolled at the conclave, the PM sat down with global venture capitalists and Indian entrepreneurs — OYO’s Ritesh Agarwal, Ronnie Screwvala and a clutch of international investors among them. Commerce minister Piyush Goyal and principal scientific adviser Ajay Kumar Sood were in the room. “India has emerged not as a consumer of solutions but as a contributor to solutions in the world.

articles.title: 2x trade in 5 years, nuclear cooperation: Modi-Macron Nice meet
articles.description: Adoption of an innovation roadmap to deepen cooperation in critical and emerging technology, launch of an economic security dialogue, another working group for AI governance and a declaration to double bilateral trade in the next five years were among the 13 outcomes announced after the meeting. Both sides also looked to ramp up defence cooperation, consistent with India’s Make in India initiative.

articles.title: Almost a year after giving engineers access to Claude and Cursor, Disney tells engineers: Minimise AI-coded products that ...
articles.description: Disney is urging its engineers to use AI tools like Claude and Cursor efficiently, focusing on boosting development speed without compromising code quality. The company aims to prevent AI-generated products from failing post-release, emphasizing productivity over excessive AI token usage. This strategic push follows a failed billion-dollar partnership with OpenAI.

articles.title: Automation to intelligence: How India’s manufacturers must evolve
articles.description: AI in manufacturing: This opinion piece argues India must invest in Industry 4.0, indigenous technologies, research and smart manufacturing to strengthen productivity, reduce import dependence and build global industrial competitiveness.

articles.description: India’s UPI is now active at multiple French locations including airports and the Eiffel Tower, with expansion planned further as India-France ties deepen through talks between Modi and Macron.
